articles.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham, a close Trump ally and foreign policy hawk, dies after a brief illness
articles.description:
A noted hawk, Graham was one of the most influential figures in Washington on foreign affairs and he advised Trump on matters such as the Iran war and Russia.

The post Sen. Lindsey Graham, a close Trump ally and foreign policy hawk, dies after a brief illness appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sen. Lindsey Graham died on July 12, 2026, after a brief illness.
Graham was a key advisor to Trump on foreign policy issues, influencing U.S. relations.
His death may impact local political dynamics and foreign policy discussions in Boston.
